# Runtime dependencies for slack-certify-mapf.
#
# Versions use lower-bound constraints (>=) and have not been pinned to exact
# point releases yet — the pinned wheel set used for the ASYU 2026 camera-ready
# results lives in `requirements.lock` (generated by pip-compile from this file
# on the reference toolchain).
#
# TODO pin: regenerate `requirements.lock` against the May 2026 stable releases
#           prior to tagging v0.1.0.

numpy>=1.26
scipy>=1.11
networkx>=3.2
pydantic>=2.5
pyyaml>=6.0
typer>=0.12
rich>=13.7
tqdm>=4.66
pandas>=2.1
pyarrow>=14
jsonschema>=4.20
joblib>=1.3
